blended.narrative: Waterville Valley is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 366 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

Friday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
